title: [Let's Do Addon] Questing Items
description:
A small content mod that adds various items usable for questing and storytelling. Mainly used for the Let's Do public server.

Contain's 98 lore items that have no uses (yet), and one custom weapon that allows you to leap.
body:
# [Let's Do Addon] Quest Items
## Intro
This mod adds many useless items that are used for the official [Let's Do] public server. 

## Key Features
- Adds 98 uncraftable items meant for usage in quests, modpacks, or servers.
- Adds 1 uncraftable weapon meant for usage in quests, modpacks, or servers. The weapon allows the wielder to leap into the air.

## Outro
I hope you get some use out of this mod while further developments are made and some items might receive uses in the future. You are allowed to use this mod in your modpack but I advise you use a questing mod and/or KubeJS. Do NOT distribute or edit this mod for your own benefits.

## Credits
- CR-055 (me) for making this mod.
- Satisfyl for helping with code, and delivering art resources.
